The directory to search is /testdata/. The user mentioned using the bash tool, so I should construct the command accordingly.

I should check if the bash tool can handle this. The tool's description says it can execute bash commands, so it's safe to use. The command would be 'find /testdata/ -type f -name ".*" -delete'.
